message:
Add Prometheus observability documentation for bead 597

- Add comprehensive Grafana dashboard JSON with panels for:
  - Overview metrics (workers, builds, queue, utilization)
  - Build metrics (throughput, duration percentiles)
  - Worker metrics (slots, latency, status)
  - Decision latency SLA tracking (<1ms non-compilation, <5ms compilation)
  - Circuit breaker state and events
  - Transfer metrics and classification tiers
  - API request rates

- Add AlertManager rules for production monitoring:
  - Worker health alerts (all down, individual down, stale, degraded)
  - Circuit breaker alerts (open state, high trip rate)
  - Build health alerts (failure rate, queue depth)
  - Decision latency SLA breach alerts (CRITICAL)
  - Transfer and daemon health alerts
  - Slot utilization alerts

- Update monitoring guide with references to new observability docs

Closes bead remote_compilation_helper-597

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+      status: (build.exit_code === 0 ? 'success' : 'failed') as BuildStatus,
       project_id: build.project_id,
       worker_id: build.worker_id,
       command: build.command,
